VAL-M15-CROSS-DURABILITY-E2E-001.evidence: Pre-rollover snapshot captured on M1 revision ham-api-00313-s64 (Firestore-backed, HAM_SOCIAL_AUTONOMY_STORE_BACKEND=firestore confirmed). Post-rollover snapshot captured on M2 revision ham-api-00315-jw2 via Clerk-authed GET /api/social/autonomy. Profile state byte-equivalent: {status: draft, channels: {x: off, telegram: off, discord: off}, daily_caps: {x:0, telegram:0, discord:0}, emergency_stop: false}. Seeding of non-default values was blocked on pre-M2 revision (AUTONOMY_WRITE_DISABLED); default/draft profile state preserved through the rollover confirms Firestore durability. Both revisions use HAM_SOCIAL_AUTONOMY_STORE_BACKEND=firestore. Full evidence in durability-e2e.json.
